title: Mustardy Ayurvedic Algerian Oranges Tagine
description: A hangover-curing Tagine featuring the tangy flavors of oranges, mustard, and spices. Perfect for a Moroccan-inspired breakfast or brunch.

ingredients.name: Organic oranges
ingredients.notes: Juice of 2 oranges, peel of 1 orange

instructions: Place the orange peel and juice in a blender and blend until smooth.
Add 2 tablespoons of Dijon mustard and blend until well combined.
Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a sous-vide machine set to 1953F.
Add 1 teaspoon of ground ginger, 1 teaspoon of ground cinnamon, and 1/2 teaspoon of ground cayenne pepper to the oil and stir to combine.
